tasks.notes: ADR-003 completed with Go verdict. Validated codebase structure amenable to GitNexus AST analysis.
ADR-001, ADR-002, ADR-003 all written with explicit decisions. npm run build succeeded. npm test: 1314 passed, 14 skipped, 2 pre-existing failures in time-utils (unrelated to KB). No regressions.
Added gitnexus MCP server to .mcp.json (npx -y gitnexus mcp). Created docs/knowledge-layer.md stub.

Created src/services/knowledge/types.ts. All types exported: KBEntry, KBEntryInput, MemoryProvider, AudnDecision ('add'|'update'|'flagged'|'none'), GitNexusCall, PrimedContext. Compiles with zero errors.

Created sqlite-provider.ts and kb-service.ts. better-sqlite3 installed. WAL mode set. FTS5 virtual table with DELETE+INSERT triggers. Content cap 4000 chars. FLEET_DIR path from paths.ts. All 8 stub methods present. npm run build passes.

computeFileHash (git primary via execFile, sha256 fallback), computeFileHashBatch (single git call for N files), checkStaleness (invalidated/file_missing/unreadable/hash compare). 10 unit tests (all pass): git hash, null for missing file, sha256 fallback, batch single call, stale=false match, stale=true mismatch, file_missing, EACCES unreadable, invalidated immediate stale, non-context-cache skip.
npm run build passes. npm test passes. DB initializes. FTS5 table works. No regressions.
src/tools/kb-capture.ts. Full SqliteProvider.capture() with AUDN evaluation. Returns audn_decision.

tasks.step: Task 6: kb_invalidate MCP Tool + Git Hook
tasks.notes: src/tools/kb-invalidate.ts. CLI shim. Git hook: while IFS= read -r f; do ... done (quoting fix).
AND-logic dedup (symbol + file + title ALL required). flagged_for_review path. 5 unit test cases.
kb_capture creates entry. Duplicate returns none. Updated fact supersedes. Git hook fires on commit.
Returns stale/fresh entries for given files. Uses computeFileHashBatch (single git call).
Warm/cold detection. L1 scan. Returns recommended_gitnexus_calls as {tool, args}[] not strings.
FTS5 search, L1/L2 two-level retrieval. Type filter. Stale exclusion. Superseded exclusion.
Cold->warm session E2E. kb_query returns results. Token warm-hit ratio > 50% (measure it).
knowledge-curator fleet role. kb_harvest reads session transcript, captures learnings.
Upgrades entry confidence INFERRED->CONFIRMED. Reviewer tool.
Auto-wire kb_harvest to execute_prompt completion. PM does NOT dispatch manually.
Installs git hook, writes config, stores credentials encrypted.
No SQL injection (prepared statements). No command injection (execFile not exec). No path traversal. No plaintext credentials.
apra-fleet kb-server --port 7878. Bearer token auth. Rate limiting 100 req/min. EADDRINUSE message.

tasks.step: VERIFY: Phase 4a - KB Agent + Security + Server
tasks.notes: KB Agent harvests. Promote works. Security: no injection/traversal/plaintext creds. Server starts, rejects 401.
Proxies to kb-server. Offline read fallback to SqliteProvider. Write queue max 1000. beforeExit warning.
docs/knowledge-layer.md, docs/architecture.md, README.md. Setup guide, provider swap, troubleshooting.
Full E2E cold->warm. Central service E2E. Offline degradation. Security clean. npm test passes. npm run build:binary works. Docs accurate.
